name: Automate Email Filtering & AI Summarization. 100% free & effective, works 7/24
description:
Good to know:
This workflow automatically processes incoming emails (you can filter them base on your needs) and creates concise AI-powered summaries, then logs them to a Google Sheets spreadsheet for easy tracking and analysis.

Who is this for?

‚ěĖBusiness professionals who receive many emails and need quick summaries
‚ěĖCustomer service teams tracking email communications
‚ěĖProject managers monitoring email correspondence
‚ěĖAnyone who wants to automatically organize and summarize their email communications

What problem is this workflow solving?

This workflow solves the problem of email overload by automatically reading incoming emails, generating concise summaries using AI, and organizing them in a structured format. It eliminates the need to manually read through every email to understand the key points and maintains a searchable record of communications.

What this workflow does:

‚úÖMonitors your Gmail inbox for new emails
‚úÖFilters emails based on specific criteria (sender validation)
‚úÖExtracts key information (sender, date, subject, content)
‚úÖUses AI to generate concise summaries of email content
‚úÖAutomatically logs all data including the AI summary to a Google Sheets spreadsheet

How it works:

1ÔłŹ‚É£Gmail trigger monitors for new emails at specified intervals
2ÔłŹ‚É£Email data is processed and formatted using JavaScript
3ÔłŹ‚É£A conditional check validates the sender
4ÔłŹ‚É£AI agent (powered by Groq's language model) reads the email content and generates a summary
5ÔłŹ‚É£All information is automatically appended to a Google Sheets document

How to use:

Set up Gmail OAuth2 credentials in n8n
Configure Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials
Set up Groq API credentials for AI processing
Create a Google Sheets document and update the document ID
Customize the sender validation criteria as needed
Activate the workflow

Requirements:

‚úÖn8n instance (cloud or self-hosted)
‚úÖGmail account with OAuth2 access
‚úÖGoogle Sheets account
‚úÖAI API
‚úÖBasic understanding of n8n workflow

Customizing this workflow:

ūüüĘModify the Gmail trigger filters to target specific labels or criteria
ūüüĘAdjust the sender validation logic in the conditional node
ūüüĘCustomize the AI prompt to change summary style or focus
ūüüĘAdd additional data fields to the Google Sheets output
ūüüĘChange the polling frequency for checking new emails
ūüüĘSwitch to different AI models by replacing the Groq node
